title: Brazilian Banana Pudding
description: A creamy and sweet dessert inspired by Brazilian cuisine, featuring bananas and a rich pudding.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, whisk together the pudding, sweetened condensed milk, egg yolks, and sugar. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and stir in the melted butter and flour.
Let the mixture cool to room temperature.
In a separate bowl, slice the bananas into 1-inch pieces.
To assemble the dessert, layer the banana slices and the pudding mixture in individual serving cups or a large serving dish.
Refrigerate the dessert for at least 2 hours, or until chilled.
Serve the dessert chilled, garnished with additional banana slices if desired.
